title: Codereview pass 3: Remove shadowed WINDOW_SIZE constant
description:
Minor: is_replay_candidate() at line 342 re-declares `const WINDOW_SIZE: u32 = 32;` which shadows the module-level `pub const WINDOW_SIZE: u32 = 32;` at line 61.

**Fix:** Remove the local declaration and use the module-level constant instead.

**Location:** rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs line 342
